Hey Shinpei! This... isn't this the beach we're at right now?

target: Jeez!! Put the phone down over there and come here for a sec! Let's be in the shot together!
This should be around here.
Perfect, perfect.
(Wh...! Ushio and... her Shadow... together!?)
(Ushio... what on earth are you doing...)
Shinpei.
Listen carefully, got it?
The only ones who can unlock this phone are me and my Shadow.
I changed the password to something random. It might be pointless... but I wanted to resist even a little bit.
So right now, my Shadow should be right next to you, Shinpei.
Ah! By the way, can you tell which one is me?
Hey! I'm the one talking right now!!
Left? Or right?
Th-They sure get along well.
..."It doesn't matter."
It doesn't matter!
"We're both me"...
We're both me!
(Huh... Ushio...?)
I think you already know, but she's different from the other Shadows, she's not a bad guy, so don't worry!
She's your ally, Shinpei. I guarantee it!
...I want you to hear the details from my Shadow, but I wanted to leave a direct message in my own words, which is why I'm recording this now.
Where should I start... Right... It all started with Shiori-chan...
That was on July 17th. I heard a strange story from Shiori-chan.
Ushio Kofune
July 17
No, Ushio!! Definitely not!!! It's not on the level of a lookalike or anything like that!!
Even today~~, I felt like someone was following me on the way home from school~~~~~~.
Isn't that a suspicious person!! Be careful! Should I tell Totsumura!?
Like Totsumura would be any help!! Besides, it's definitely "that girl"! She was watching me all day yesterday and the day before, too!?
Isn't it just a coincidence?
Jeez, you're not taking me seriously at all!!
July 18
(...And then on the 18th, during the beach cleanup...)
...Heave-ho. *Sigh*~, didn't the amount of trash increase again this year?
The increase in tourists is a double-edged sword! At this rate, Hitogashima is going to become a nest for party animals!!
Now, now... I'm sure there are party animals who take their trash home properly...
Huh!?
Look at that, Mio!
Huh?
No way! ...Huh? I-Is that... Sis!?
…Who are you!?
Huh...?
Ah! Wait!!
...She ran away... I can't see her anymore...
…A Shadow…
Look! The ghost story Grandma used to tell us when we were little... don't you remember!?
Ah!! The one... where you die if you see it!?
Don't be stupid. Don't scare me, Mio!! That was just a lookalike—
(Shiori-chan said... "It's not on the level of a lookalike"...)
...Mio!! Let's go look for Shiori-chan!!
Huh... Y-Yeah!
Huh? A Shadow?
Yes! Shiori-chan, about the "lookalike"... Did you see it today!?
Nope! I haven't seen it yet today!
I see...
I'm going to look into this a bit.
Huh! You finally believe me!?
I do!! So you don't need to worry anymore!
The Omoto Beach Trash Cleanup is now concluded!!
Thanks to everyone, it's all clean, and tomorrow is the start of the beach season~~~.
The trash we collected today will be burned at the Umi-okuri on the 24th!
Ummm, the origins of the Umi-okuri, if we trace them back, date back 300 years...
Karikiri-san, if that story's gonna be long, save it for next time~~!!
My apologies! You must all be tired!
Well then, everyone! Let's meet next at the summer festival on the 24th~~!!
(...And then, after returning home)
Hey, Sis. I wonder if Shin-chan will come back this summer...
Huh? I don't care if a guy like that never comes back...!
...Even though you like him...
Sis, even though you like Shin-chan.
Wh...
Like hell I do!! Don't say such stupid things!!
Move it!! I'm taking a bath first!!!
(Shinpei... I wonder what he's doing right now...)
(Wait, what am I thinking! A guy like that...!!)
Hah~~~, I need to cool my head!
...Huh?
Welcome home...
...M-Mio—
Don't!
Nngh!? Mmmmmmmmph!!
Shhhhhh. Just calm down for a sec!
...So, care to answer? Who the heck are you!!? Why were you in our house?
I'm Ushio Kofune!! I just came back to my own house.
...Th-Then! Why were you hiding in the bath!?
Because you came back with Mio!!
Y... You're...
Hey...
Do you know about Shadows?
Huh!?
You're the Shadow!!
You are, right!?
(Eh~~~! What is going on here~~!?)
Wait a minute... If Shadows really do exist—
That means Shiori-chan's Shadow is also somewhere on this island!
…I have a bad feeling.
Huh!?
Didn't Shiori-chan say she first saw the Shadow at <color=#GF_TIPS_046>Mt. Takanosu</color>!?
Looks like we need to investigate this, doesn't it!? Is there something at Mt. Takanosu...
(...We're the same! Me and her... Not just our appearance, but our memories... and even our way of thinking...!!)
(She doesn't seem harmful for now...)
Alright!! Well whatever, I'll deal with you later!!
First…
To Mt. Takanosu!!
